description_long: This is a tall, rectangular vending machine with a weathered blue exterior, showing signs of rust and wear, especially along the edges and corners. The front face features a large transparent display window showcasing a variety of bottled and canned beverages, each with visible labels and branding. Below the display window, there is a product retrieval slot, a payment interface with coin and bill acceptors, and a digital display panel for transaction information. The sides of the machine are plain blue with streaks of grime, while the back is adorned with black graffiti art, adding to its urban character. The machine is constructed primarily from metal, with glass for the display window and plastic for buttons and internal components. Its overall appearance suggests it is a durable, public-use vending machine commonly found on city streets or in parks.
description: A weathered blue vending machine with a transparent display window showing assorted drinks, a payment interface, and graffiti on the back. The machine is tall, rectangular, and built for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the transparent product display, payment interface, selection buttons, and product retrieval slot.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain, weathered blue surface with visible rust and grime streaks.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring prominent black graffiti art on a blue, worn background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain, weathered blue surface and signs of wear.
attribute_display_panel: A small rectangular digital display panel is located on the upper right section of the front face, showing transaction information and instructions.
attribute_payment_interface: The payment interface includes a coin slot, bill acceptor, and card reader, all located on the right side of the front face below the display panel.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: Individual rectangular selection buttons are arranged vertically to the right of the product display, each labeled with numbers or product codes.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide rectangular retrieval slot with a flap is located at the bottom center of the front face.
attribute_branding_or_signage: No prominent branding or logos are visible on the front; the back features large black graffiti art as a form of urban signage.
